metadata.title: Emanuel Pereyra - Senior Software Engineer
metadata.description: 19+ years building scalable systems. Full-stack engineer specializing in modern web technologies.

home.heading: Senior Software Engineer

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: Senior Software Engineer with over 19 years of experience designing and building scalable, high-quality software solutions. Specialized in full-stack web development with deep expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems, cloud infrastructure, and engineering best practices.
about.description: Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring engineering teams. Currently focused on modern React/Next.js applications and cloud-native solutions.

Building React components loosely coupled with CSS optimized for improved SSR performance
